HowTo: Google removed HowTo rich results (June 2025). The type is still valid Schema.org but no longer yields rich results.
FAQPage: Google restricts FAQ rich results to authoritative government/health sites (Aug 2023). Still valid and useful for AI extraction, but expect no SERP rich result.
ClaimReview: ClaimReview rich results were deprecated for most sites (June 2025). Still valid Schema.org; no rich result for non-allowlisted publishers.
SpecialAnnouncement: COVID-era SpecialAnnouncement rich results were retired (June 2025).
Course: Course Info carousel rich result was narrowed (June 2025); the Course type stays valid for AI extraction.
